nasb.text: But even if you should suffer for the sake of righteousness, you are blessed. And do not fear their intimidation, and do not be troubled,

esv.text: But even if you should suffer for righteousness’ sake, you will be blessed. Have no fear of them, nor be troubled,

cnv.text: 就算你們要為義受苦，也是有福的。“不要怕人的恐嚇，也不要畏懼。”

ccb.text: 就算你们为义受苦，也是有福的。不要害怕别人的恐吓，也不要惊慌，

csbs.text: 然而，即使你们为义受苦，也是蒙福的。不要怕他们所惧怕的，也不要惊慌不安，
